produce_support.content:
Good Morning,  Christina @ CMG just sent a message : 
"Hello, The counter on Line 2 has been having many issues. It won't zero out after we post a Job ID and it will randomly stop counting as we are producing a batch. We have unplugged the counter several times. This seems to help briefly, but the p

Morning Nathan - Andrew @ CTM is requesting a report so I went into Stage to practice building a brand new report but ran into issues with connecting to a Database, used the wizard but neither options went through just kept telling me it could not connect.  Is their instructions on setting a connect

Yeah, that's a little complicated, haha. Basically, it requires joins and such to display the column for them. It's not difficult if you know how to do it, but it's hard to explain. I've been trying to find time to go in there and add it for her, but haven't been able to yet. i have time late today,

directors.content: Yes, I think it is a great idea.
I'm fine with that. Chris, do you have any issue with that?

Nathan any chance we can switch rob to Growpoint integration rather than merge.dev... then once i finish inventory and production schedule i can look at merge.dev? Just think it makes sense for him since he has the context.
Reminder I’ll be out of office tomorrow. Will make myself available if I need to! Going to KY for my parents anniversary
Yep, i need to fix that.
here is what I'm talking about:
one other note on that one - your front end is putting "DTS" lingo allllll over that thing.
its not. There was a mistake in AI Helm that added that, it shouldn't be accurate. where are you seeing that?

Nathan van Wingerden are you sure that merge.dev is relevant/blocking for dts module? I think DTS api would just be custom integration, similar to how i'm doing growpoint api? could be wrong, but just wanted to bring it up

Yeah, it will require a lot more communication, and we'll see how it goes. I think there is going to be a FAT learning curve, but it's a needed change. Scott already been effectively doing this, you're doing this, we need our devs to continue doing this. I'm here to answer any questions, and we'll g
I'm stressed for them haha... going from "go put this backend function in for this one button" to "go build this application" has got to feel very uncomfy...
both you guys are messaging me privatly
